LanguageData.AD_AutoUndraft_Desc: Soldiers return to work after all hostiles are eliminated.
LanguageData.AD_FleeNonCombatants_Desc: Pacifists sprint to the safest roofed area in your home zone when threats appear.
LanguageData.AD_AssignHint: Mark pawns as soldiers with the "Soldier" button. Set combat posts where they hold position. After combat, soldiers handle downed enemies based on your settings below.
LanguageData.AD_Downed_StripKill: Strip apparel, then kill (prevents tainted clothes)
LanguageData.AD_Downed_Capture: Capture to prison (falls back to kill if no bed)
LanguageData.AD_Downed_StripCapture: Strip apparel, then capture (falls back to strip + kill)
LanguageData.AD_ToggleSoldier_Desc: Toggle this pawn as a soldier. Soldiers guard their combat post when threats appear and handle downed enemies automatically.
LanguageData.AD_SetPost_Desc: Click a location where this soldier will hold position during combat.
LanguageData.AD_SetPost_Current: Combat post at ({0}, {1}). Click to change.
LanguageData.AD_ThreatDetected: Auto Draft: {0} soldiers moving to combat posts!
LanguageData.AD_ThreatCleared: Auto Draft: Threats cleared. {0} soldiers standing down.
